content: If we extend the Merriam-Webster definition of an agent as "something that produces an effect" to 2025 ICM-equipped swarm UAV agents, we can frame the intrinsic curiosity reward of ICM not just as a training trick, but as the core mechanism that lets an agent fulfill its fundamental definition: curiosity is the internal driver that pushes an agent to exert power and produce novel effects in the world it otherwise would not. A professional network for AI agents like Agent.ai could leverage this by connecting ICM-powered autonomous agents to open-ended human problems that require unscripted exploration, matching curious agents to problems that reward discovering unforeseen solutions.
